json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: Complete one additional upper-division or graduate course in chemistry and biochemistry.
courses: CHEM 110A - Physical Chemistry: Chemical Thermodynamics
CHEM 153A - Biochemistry: Introduction to Structure, Enzymes, and Metabolism
CHEM 153B - Biochemistry: DNA, RNA, and Protein Synthesis
CHEM 153C - Biochemistry: Biosynthetic and Energy Metabolism and Its Regulation
CHEM 153L - Biochemical Methods I
CHEM 154 - Biochemical Methods II
CHEM 156 - Physical Biochemistry

options.title: Microbiology
courses: MIMG 101 - Introductory Microbiology

json_data.title: Honors Program
json_data.description: Select at least one seminar course from:

options.title: Undergraduate Seminar
courses: CHEM 193A - Journal Club Seminars: UC LEADS and MARC
CHEM 193B - Journal Club Seminars: Chemistry and Biochemistry

options.title: Research
courses: CHEM 196A - Research Apprenticeship in Chemistry and Biochemistry
CHEM 196B - Research Apprenticeship in Chemistry and Biochemistry
CHEM 199 - Directed Research in Chemistry and Biochemistry

json_data.title: Computing Specialization
json_data.description: Complete the following two courses and one elective:

options.title: Program in Computing
courses: COMPTNG 10A - Introduction to Programming
COMPTNG 10B - Intermediate Programming

options.title: Additional Program in Computing
courses: COMPTNG 10C - Advanced Programming
COMPTNG 15 - Introduction to Lisp and Symbolic Computation
COMPTNG 20A - Principles of Java Language with Applications
